response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned full-stack and systems software engineer with 15+ years of experience and genuine depth in low-latency backend systems, but his background is almost entirely in web development, backend services, and developer tooling. The role demands SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture expertise, SIMD/MIMD programming, and AI accelerator performance analysis — none of which appear anywhere in his resume. His recent AI-adjacent work (MCP frameworks, agentic tooling) is at the software abstraction layer, not the hardware optimization layer this position requires.
strengths: 15+ years of progressive IC experience, reaching Staff-level at multiple companies, demonstrating sustained technical depth
Demonstrated low-latency, high-throughput systems work at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/second, async I/O, fiber-based concurrency in DLang)
Breadth across embedded systems, web, mobile, and infrastructure signals adaptability and a systems-aware mindset
concerns: No SoC or IP modeling experience whatsoever — the primary technical competency for this role is entirely absent from the resume
No GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or AI accelerator expertise; deep neural network training and inference optimization are unrepresented
Core skill set is web/full-stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB), which is orthogonal to the hardware-software co-design and performance modeling this position demands
